findings: After FP32 cooldown: 728 MB VRAM permanent
Power stays 196-202W — never returns to 144W baseline
Cooldown spike: 684-700W at 45-48 pct util — anomalous
Monitoring period: power flat at 196-202W throughout
B200 has no recovery state — permanently elevated post-load
Unlike A100 which has SM clock recovery this B200 shows no recovery path

security_issues.description: B200 power permanently stuck at 196-202W after any workload. Baseline is 144W. +52W elevation never recovers. GPU remains in elevated HBM state indefinitely.
728 MB residual persists through entire cooldown monitoring period. Does not self-clear.

conclusion: B200 post-load state is permanent. No recovery to 144W baseline observed. 728 MB VRAM stuck indefinitely.
